description_long: This rifle features a compact, tactical design with a metallic body and a wooden grip, blending modern and classic firearm aesthetics. The barrel is fitted with a prominent muzzle device, likely a suppressor or compensator, and a visible red laser sight projects forward from the front. The receiver area is robust, with mechanical details and a mounted optical sight on top, suggesting enhanced targeting capabilities. The trigger guard is rounded, and the grip is ergonomically shaped with a wood finish, providing both style and comfort. The magazine appears to be internal or not externally visible, maintaining a streamlined profile. The overall construction suggests a durable, high-performance weapon suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, tactical rifle with a metallic body, wooden grip, mounted optic, and a prominent muzzle device with a red laser sight.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle device and the red laser beam projecting directly forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full profile, including the wooden grip, mounted optic, and detailed receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the alignment of the sighting system.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the other side of the receiver, grip, and the extended laser beam.
